curation_notes: Re-curation with updated guidelines. The patch modifies a single XML UI template file, wrapping $doc.title with $services.rendering.escape() in a label element to prevent XSS. Location derived from the patch diff (1 file changed). No sibling files in ChangeRequest/Code/ use the same unescaped $doc.title pattern. L3 hints improved to be more specific than L1/L2 — L3 area narrows to the detail view and title editing components, and L3 description adds context about the title display area and the criticality of the attack surface. Pre-assigned vuln_class 'xss' confirmed correct based on CWE-79, the advisory description, and the patch adding output escaping.
